choices.label: A

choices.label: B
choices.text: days after the company went public, the company's estimated stock price 1.

choices.label: C
choices.text: The company's estimated stock price increased 58 every day after the company went public.

choices.label: D
choices.text: The company's estimated stock price increased 1 every 58 days after the company went public.
